title: Set secure file permissions
description: Setting loose POSIX file permissions can expose sensitive files to unauthorized access. Overly permissive file permissions allow unintended users to read, modify, or execute critical application files and data.
recommendation: Use restrictive file permissions that grant access only to necessary users and processes.

noncompliant.description: Overly permissive file permissions expose sensitive data to unauthorized access.

compliant.description: Use restrictive file permissions that grant access only to necessary users and processes.

checks.message: Use restrictive file permissions that grant access only to necessary users and processes.
